seoTitle: Mount Lewis vs Mount Marsden — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Lewis and Mount Marsden. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Lewis vs Mount Marsden: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Lewis and Mount Marsden.
heading: Mount Lewis vs Mount Marsden — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Lewis, New South Wales and Mount Marsden, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Lewis has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Mount Marsden (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Lewis or Mount Marsden safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Lewis has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Mount Marsden scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Lewis scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Marsden scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Lewis or Mount Marsden?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Lewis has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
